description: Style Noteboss Woman is a floral fruity fragrance that comes in an interesting half moon shaped bottle. Designed for active woman of today, this fragrance was crafted to go with sophisticated sportswear. Product DetailsThe top notes are tangerine, mango and kumquat. At its heart, freesia, orris, passiflore, while the base is warm from the blend sandal and cedarwood CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes Size50 ml
